title: pouteria fragrans
intro: Pouteria fragrans, also known as the fragrant pouteria, is a medicinal plant species native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The extracts from Pouteria fragrans have been shown to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Pouteria fragrans is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
